<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$TDPS$ = Damage * Missile Count / Firerate
$CDPS$ = ((Damage / Firerate) * 10) / 30
$SDPS$ = ((Damage / Firerate) * 10) / 60
$CE$ = Total Price / Call to Arms DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 650; 400; 2450; 4500; 14000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; 2; 2
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Leadership; Call to Arms; Intense Training; Strength in Numbers
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 5525000768; 4594880289; 5525002879; 17512145719
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$DREF$ = <ref>DPS is calculated as ((Damage ÷ Firerate) × Attack Time) ÷ Ability Cooldown<br>'''Attack Time''' is the time in which the Commander can attack during its abilities while '''Ability Cooldown''' is the minimum time between ability activations.<br>DPS does not include any Firerate Buffs.</ref>
$SREF$ = <ref>If both abilites are used, DPS is the same as Call to Arms DPS.</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="10" | Commander Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Firerate Buff !! Call to Arms Buff !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! Call to Arms DPS$DREF$ !! Support Caravan DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10% || N/A || N/A || N/A || 10 || N/A || N/A || N/A
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 15% || N/A || N/A || N/A || 10 || N/A || N/A || N/A
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 15% || 10% || 15 || 0.6 || 13 || $CDPS$ || N/A || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 17.5% || 15% || 30 || 0.6 || 15 || $CDPS$ || N/A || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 20% || 20% || 50 || 0.6 || 17 || $CDPS$$SREF$ || $SDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}

{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="8" | Support Caravan Units Stats
|-
! Unit !! Health !! Damage !! Missile Count !! Firerate !! Range !! Explosion Range !! DPS
|-
| [[Gunner APC]] || 200 || 8 || N/A || 0.2 || 30 || N/A || $DPS$
|-
| [[Missile APC]] || 300 || 40 || 4 || 2 || 25 || 5 || $TDPS$
|}
</div>
